text:
Pranapada and BT rectification
The text 'Jyotisha ratnakara' states that, the Pranapada
method given by Parasara can be used for BT rectification.
What is Pranapada? BPHS provides answer to the same.

[Convert the given time into Vikhatikas and divide the same
by 15. The result should be treated as Sign-Degree-Minute.

~B~ir~ffi~T~i~m~e~R~e~ct~ifi~zc~a~tio~n~M~et~h~od~s, _______________________8 5
This should be added to sun if sun is in a movable sign, which
will yield Pranapada. lf the sun is in a fixed sign, add 240
degrees additionally and if in dual sign add.l20 degrees.
(Remove the multiples of 360 degrees if the result is more
than 360 degrees). This resultant longitude is known as
Pranapada]
Jyotisha ratnakara states that the Pranapada would be in
the trines or 7th of Lagna.
